sentences.arabic: الكَرَمُ هُوَ جُزْءٌ أَسَاسِيٌّ مِنَ الثَّقَافَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo je osnovni dio arapske kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is a fundamental part of Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَزُورُ الضَّيْفُ البَيْتَ، يَسْتَقْبِلُهُ صَاحِبُ الدَّارِ بِتَرْحِيبٍ حَارٍّ.
sentences.translation: Kada gost posjeti kuću, domaćin ga prima sa srdačnom dobrodošlicom.
sentences.translationEn: When a guest visits a home, the host receives them with a warm welcome.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ العَرَبُ القَهْوَةَ وَالتَّمْرَ لِلضُّيُوفِ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Arapi gostima uvijek poslužuju kafu i hurme.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs always serve coffee and dates to guests.

sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ إِكْرَامُ الضَّيْفِ وَاجِبًا وَتَقْلِيدًا قَدِيمًا.
sentences.translation: Gošćenje gosta smatra se obavezom i starom tradicijom.
sentences.translationEn: Honoring a guest is considered a duty and an ancient tradition.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ الزَّائِرُ بِالرَّاحَةِ وَالسَّعَادَةِ فِي كُلِّ مَنْزِلٍ.
sentences.translation: Posjetilac se osjeća ugodno i sretno u svakom domu.
sentences.translationEn: The visitor feels comfortable and happy in every home.
